title: Sour Crisp Paleo Red Cabbage Stir-fry
description: This quick-fix dish features sour fermented red cabbage in a paleo-friendly stir-fry, making it a delicious and nutritious option for any meal.

ingredients.name: fermented red cabbage
ingredients.notes: ensure it's paleo-friendly and fermented correctly

ingredients.name: chopped green bell pepper
ingredients.notes: use mild variety like banana or honeybell

ingredients.name: sesame seeds
ingredients.notes: optional for added crunch and flavor

instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped green bell pepper and minced garlic to the pan, stir-fry for about 2 minutes.
Stir in fermented red cabbage, cook for another minute or until slightly softened.
If using, sprinkle sesame seeds on top of the dish just before serving for added texture.
